issues.description: classify_evidence patterns are over-broad: ISO date alone → dated_log; 7+ hex chars alone → commit_or_pr; bare 'json'/'runs'/'log' tokens match. Weak free-text can satisfy item_may_be_marked_complete without substantive evidence.
issues.recommendation: Tighten patterns (require multi-signal match or explicit kind prefixes) if this helper is wired as a hard gate; keep advisory-only until then.
